## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Tested in a WebGPU-capable desktop browser, if UI/model-loading behavior changed

## Safety

- [ ] No real PHI is included in code, docs, logs, screenshots, fixtures, or examples
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, generated model artifacts, or large training outputs are committed
- [ ] README/training docs were updated if behavior or model revisions changed
